data.title: Radiant Logic Earns Two 2026 Cybersecurity Industry Awards for Identity Security Innovation
data.description: Radiant Logic, a renowned company specializing in Identity Data Fabric and Identity Security Posture Management (ISPM), has been honored with two prestigious cybersecurity industry accolades in 2026. The company received the Gold Award in the Identity and Access Management (IAM) category at the 2026 Globee Cybersecurity Awards and was also recognized as a Silver Award recipient in the ISPM category at the 2026 Cybers. These awards highlight Radiant Logic's exceptional dedication to innovation and leadership in the field of identity security.

data.title: Sherweb Secures $125 Million Investment to Accelerate Global Expansion
data.description: Sherweb, a renowned cloud distributor based in Montréal, has just finalized a minority equity investment deal worth $125 million with Investissement Québec. This substantial investment marks a significant development for the company.

data.title: PEPE price prediction: Neutral momentum with RSI at 50.27. Analyst predicts potential 30x-90x rally from critical levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency PEPE is currently trading with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 50.27. Crypto Educate predicts a potential rally of 30 to 90 times from crucial Fibonacci levels. However, the current technical analysis indicates conflicting signals.

data.title: Quorum and Glia Redefine Phone Banking With Always-On, Intelligent Voice Support
data.description: Quorum Federal Credit Union, a well-known financial industry leader catering to members nationwide, has revealed a strengthened collaboration with Glia, the premier platform for intelligent banking interactions. This enhanced partnership will incorporate an advanced banking-oriented voice AI agent to elevate efficiency and ease for Quorum members by providing immediate access to round-the-clock conversational phone assistance. This move underscores Quorum's position as a forward-thinking organization focused on leveraging technology.

data.title: Thesis Care Announces $45 Million Series A to Scale AI-Powered Clinical Teams Across Healthcare
data.description: A company in New York, previously known as Trovo Health but now rebranded as Thesis Care, has secured $45 million in Series A funding. The funding round was led by Oak HC/FT, with participation from CRV, Black Opal Ventures, and notable healthcare technology angel investors. This brings the total funding raised by Thesis Care to $60 million. The company, which offers an AI-powered care team platform for scalable clinical capacity, aims to expand its services with the new investment. The rebranding to Thesis Care signifies a new chapter in the company's growth and development.

data.title: Zapier and Rillet Partner on AI-Native Finance Stack, Connecting AI ERP to 8,000+ Apps
data.description: In San Francisco, Zapier and Rillet have collaborated on an integration that offers finance teams a comprehensive AI-native solution. Zapier, known as the most connected AI orchestration platform, has joined forces with Rillet, an AI-native ERP supported by a16z, Sequoia, and ICONIQ. This partnership merges Rillet's intelligent general ledger with Zapier's vast network of over 8,000 app integrations. It empowers AI agents to efficiently manage intricate financial processes such as month-end close, General Ledger (GL) sync, approval routing, and reconciliation. This collaboration marks the first time finance teams can access a fully AI-native stack for their operations.

data.title: Ericsson Features Realbotix Robot in World-First 6G Trial Demonstration
data.description: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp. (TSX-V: XBOT) (Frankfurt: 76M0.F) (OTC: XBOTF), a prominent AI and humanoid robot producer, revealed that one of its robots, bought by Ericsson, was highlighted in the live pre-standard 6G over-the-air trial held at Ericsson’s U.S. base in Plano, Texas. The demo by Ericsson displayed the capability of upcoming wireless networks to support AI robotics and instantaneous video streaming.

data.title: QT Imaging Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Financial Results
data.description: In Novato, California, QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: QTI), a medical device firm focused on revolutionizing breast health control via cutting-edge, radiation-free imaging tech, divulged financial figures for the three and twelve months concluding on December 31, 2025, alongside a business overview. The Company expressed satisfaction with its progression in 2025, surpassing revenue forecasts and expanding scanner deployment.

data.title: Up to 20 AI Firewall Vendors Face First Independent Security Validation
data.description: A study encompassing 32 real-world validation scenarios focusing on three security layers has been conducted to assess the efficacy of AI security products in preventing attacks rather than just making claims. The research, in alignment with OWASP and MITRE ATLAS standards, involved up to 20 vendors and the findings are expected to be revealed at Black Hat USA 2026. Notably, SecureIQLab has issued the initial publication on this investigation.

data.title: Shoppes at Four Seasons -- One of the World's Leading Luxury Shopping Destinations
data.description: In the flourishing high-end retail sector of Macao, the Shoppes at Four Seasons has become a prime attraction for top-tier tenants. With almost 19 years of operation, this luxury retail destination in Asia has consistently exceeded industry standards and garnered significant attention. The impressive success of the Shoppes at Four Seasons has placed Macao at the forefront of the high-end retail market, solidifying its reputation as a top-performing luxury retail destination.

data.title: REI Systems Achieves Final CMMC Level 2 Certification
data.description: In Sterling, VA on March 25, 2026, it was revealed that REI Systems successfully obtained certification for Cybersecurity Maturity Model Level 2 (Final), showcasing their capacity to protect Controlled Unclassified Information in compliance with U.S. regulations.

data.title: Brooklyn SolarWorks Installs New York City's First Residential Battery Energy Storage System
data.description: In a groundbreaking move for New York City, Brooklyn SolarWorks has partnered with Briggs & Stratton to revolutionize the permitting process for residential energy storage installation. This collaboration, announced in Brooklyn on March 25, 2026, signifies a major step forward in streamlining the regulatory framework for such projects in the city. Brooklyn SolarWorks, renowned as the top solar developer and installer in New York City, is spearheading this initiative. This partnership sets a new standard in the sector and is poised to significantly impact the industry.

data.title: YY Group Holding Announces Estimated Total Assets and Net Assets per Share of $8.03 and $3.18, Respectively, for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: After the completion of a share consolidation, YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) has reported total assets estimated at $34.3 million, with net assets totaling $13.6 million. YY Group is a prominent player in on-demand workforce solutions and integrated facilities on a global scale.

data.title: XGS Energy and Baker Hughes Announce Strategic Collaboration to Advance Geothermal Development in New Mexico
data.description: In Houston, XGS and Baker Hughes have announced a strategic partnership and an initial contract for engineering services to support XGS's 150-megawatt geothermal project.

data.title: SL Green Refinances One Madison Avenue for $1.65 Billion
data.description: The recent transaction represents the most substantial commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBS) issuance for office properties in the United States within the last year. This deal sets a new record for the largest office CMBS offering in the country in the past 12 months.
